arts.ttl: Arsenal, Chelsea & Liverpool eye Huijsen - Wednesday's gossip
arts.sum: Three clubs are interested in Bournemouth's Dean Huijsen, Liverpool eye Nice winger Mohamed-Ali Cho, Chelsea prepare bid for Pablo Barrios, plus more.

arts.ttl: Liverpool to play just ONE Premier League game in five-week period after nightmare run
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Everton on Wednesday night in what is the first of five fixtures across a hectic Premier League fixture list but things are set to improve very quickly for the current league leaders

arts.ttl: How Everton can exploit Liverpool's Trent Alexander-Arnold and blueprint needed to win a Merseyside derby: Stephen Warnock previews historic Goodison Park affair and reveals true thoughts on Andy Robertson
arts.sum: Warnock, a local lad himself, played in three Merseyside derbies in the mid-2000s and told Mail Sport what Liverpool must do to win in the final derby at Goodison Park.

arts.ttl: Everton line-ups for Liverpool as Vitalii Mykolenko and Carlos Alcaraz decisions made

arts.ttl: Liverpool have Bundesliga in sights with 2 midfielders and 2 defenders named
arts.sum: Liverpool appear to have set their sights firmly on the Bundesliga as they look at four potential signings in the summer. That’s according to SportBILD, who say Liverpool have Hugo Larsson, Merlin Röhl, Castello Lukeba and Konstantinos Koulierakis on their list. arts.ttl: Special Everton 24-25 'Matchday' Collection Released - Tribute to Goodison Park
arts.sum: Castore has launched a special Everton 2025 'Matchday' collection to celebrate the spirit of Goodison Park, a stadium that has provided unforgettable moments for generations of Evertonians.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany's claim about Virgil van Dijk in 2019 is looking more and more true with time - opinion
arts.sum: John Terry did not agree whatsoever 🤬

arts.ttl: How Everton can close gap on Merseyside rivals Liverpool after decades trailing behind them
arts.sum: Everton were bigger than Liverpool until the early 1970s, but have not won a trophy since 1995 and have been handicapped by money troubles - with the Toffees facing their rivals on Wednesday night
